mapper.select: SELECT ka.article_id AS articleId, ka.author_id AS authorId, e.employee_name AS authorName, ka.article_title AS articleTitle, ka.article_category AS articleCategory, ka.article_content AS articleContent, ka.article_status AS articleStatus, ka.article_approval_opinion AS articleApprovalOpinion, ka.article_rejection_reason AS articleRejectionReason, ka.view_count AS viewCount, ka.created_at AS createdAt, ka.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM knowledge_article ka LEFT JOIN employee e ON ka.author_id = e.employee_id WHERE ka.article_id = #{articleId} AND ka.is_deleted = false
